```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4843024894782521597
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:LEN": {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
      "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom mini_celery.broker.redis_streams import RedisStreamsBroker\nfrom mini_celery.db import Database\nfrom mini_celery.repository import Repository\nfrom mini_celery.scheduler.main import ScheduleConfig, Scheduler\n\n\\REDACTED\\REDACTED\nasync def test_scheduler_restart_dedupes_tick(integration_settings, redis_client) -> None:\n    db = Database(integration_settings.database_url)\n    db.init()\n    repo = Repository(db.SessionLocal)\n    broker = RedisStreamsBroker(settings=integration_settings, redis_client=redis_client)\n    await broker.ensure_consumer_group(\"default\")\n\n    now = datetime(2026, 1, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=UTC)\n    schedule = ScheduleConfig(\n        id=\"every-minute\",\n        cron=\"* * * * *\",\n        queue=\"default\",\n        type=\"pipeline_demo\",\n        payload={\"steps\": [\"a\", \"b\"], \"step_delay\": 0.0},\n        max_attempts=3,\n        enabled=True,\n    )\n\n    scheduler1 = Scheduler(\n        repo=repo,\n        broker=broker,\n        settings=integration_settings,\n        schedules=[schedule],\n        clock=lambda: now,\n    )\n    scheduler1.last_scan_at = now - timedelta(seconds=30)\n    await scheduler1.run_once(now=now)\n\n    first_count = repo.count_jobs()\n    assert first_count == 1\n\n    scheduler2 = Scheduler(\n        repo=repo,\n        broker=broker,\n        settings=integration_settings,\n        schedules=[schedule],\n        clock=lambda: now,\n    )\n    scheduler2.last_scan_at = now - timedelta(seconds=30)\n    await scheduler2.run_once(now=now)\n\n    second_count = repo.count_jobs()\n    assert second_count == 1\n"
    },
    "2:LEN": "600288626800af6fa07e1f97440ee926dd1b7d482f4479e618377936081edc0b",
    "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
  },
  "5:LEN": [
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "."
    }
  ],
  "6:VARINT": 1
}
```

ts%253D3%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Benabled%253DTrue%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bscheduler1%2B%253D%2BScheduler%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Brepo%253Drepo%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbroker%253Dbroker%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%253Dintegration_settings%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedules%253D%255Bschedule%255D%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bclock%253Dlambda%253A%2Bnow%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bscheduler1.last_scan_at%2B%253D%2Bnow%2B-%2Btimedelta%2528seconds%253D30%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bscheduler1.run_once%2528now%253Dnow%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfirst_count%2B%253D%2Brepo.count_jobs%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bfirst_count%2B%253D%253D%2B1%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bscheduler2%2B%253D%2BScheduler%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Brepo%253Drepo%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbroker%253Dbroker%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%253Dintegration_settings%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedules%253D%255Bschedule%255D%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bclock%253Dlambda%253A%2Bnow%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bscheduler2.last_scan_at%2B%253D%2Bnow%2B-%2Btimedelta%2528seconds%253D30%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bscheduler2.run_once%2528now%253Dnow%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsecond_count%2B%253D%2Brepo.count_jobs%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsecond_count%2B%253D%253D%2B1%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522600288626800af6fa07e1f97440ee926dd1b7d482f4479e618377936081edc0b%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25225%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D
